title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Ratna Sagar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ratna Sagar. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!
